title: 重试机制 (ollama.js + cloud.js)
description: Add retry logic per ARCHITECTURE.md M103 spec. src/engine/ollama.js: retry on timeout/connection/5xx with exponential backoff (1s,2s,4s, max 3x). src/engine/cloud.js: read Retry-After for 429 (max 3x), exponential backoff for 5xx. 4xx errors NOT retried. On 3rd failure mark engine degraded → fallback to next engine. Log [retry] engine=xxx attempt=N reason=xxx. Transparent to caller. ≥4 tests required.
